title: Themes
subtitle: Browse and install community themes for your Switch
error_network: Couldn't reach Themezer. Check your connection.
apply_confirm_body: Apply this theme to the system? The theme files will be installed and you'll need to reboot.
boot_recovery_body: If the console won't boot after rebooting, delete the theme folders in sd:/atmosphere/contents/ (e.g. 0100000000001000) from your PC to return to the original state.
apply_ok: Theme applied. Reboot to see the changes.
remove_ok: Theme removed. Reboot to restore the default.
warn_parts_removed: Some incompatible parts were removed automatically.
compat_wait: Please wait for the compatibility check to finish.
compat_caution: May not be fully compatible with your firmware
apply_choose_title: This theme changes the system layout and may not be compatible with your firmware. How do you want to apply it?
apply_bg_ok: Background applied. Reboot to see the changes.
base_missing_help: The firmware base layouts haven't been extracted yet. Tap "Extract now" to pull them straight from your console (requires Application mode — launch via title takeover by holding R over a game).
extract_ok: Layouts extracted to sd:/themes/systemData. Tap Apply again.
extract_no_targets: This theme has no layouts to extract.
reboot_prompt: Reboot the console now to apply?
